panels.title: BE Rate — Current Experiment (7d)
panels.description: Breakeven rate on the active experiment_id. Batch 1 exit bar is <40%. Was 79% pre-fix.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_breakeven')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type IN ('shadow_tp','shadow_sl','shadow_breakeven')), 0), 1) AS "BE Rate %" FROM ml_setups WHERE experiment_id = 'batch1_tp1_rr_1_3_2026_04_20' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

panels.title: Resolved N — Current Experiment
panels.description: Count of TP/SL/BE outcomes on current experiment. Need N≥20 to call Batch 1 decided.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Resolved" FROM ml_setups WHERE experiment_id = 'batch1_tp1_rr_1_3_2026_04_20' AND outcome_type IN ('shadow_tp','shadow_sl','shadow_breakeven')

panels.title: Win Rate — Current Experiment
panels.description: TP / (TP + SL). Ignores breakevens. Batch 1 expected: 53% (replay sim).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_tp')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type IN ('shadow_tp','shadow_sl')), 0), 1) AS "WR %" FROM ml_setups WHERE experiment_id = 'batch1_tp1_rr_1_3_2026_04_20'

panels.title: Orphan Count (24h)
panels.description: Shadows resolved as shadow_orphaned in last 24h. Indicates restart losing positions. Batch 0 goal: <5/day.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Orphans 24h" FROM ml_setups WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_orphaned' AND resolved_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Outcome Breakdown by Setup — Current Experiment
panels.description: TP/SL/BE counts per setup_type. Reveals which setup drives the most breakevens.

targets.rawSql: SELECT setup_type AS "Setup", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_tp') AS "TP", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_sl') AS "SL", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_breakeven') AS "BE", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_no_fill') AS "No Fill", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_tp')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type IN ('shadow_tp','shadow_sl')), 0), 1) AS "WR %", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_breakeven')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type IN ('shadow_tp','shadow_sl','shadow_breakeven')), 0), 1) AS "BE %" FROM ml_setups WHERE experiment_id = 'batch1_tp1_rr_1_3_2026_04_20' GROUP BY setup_type ORDER BY setup_type

panels.title: Experiment Comparison — Before vs After Batch 1
panels.description: Side-by-side of prior experiment vs current. BE rate should drop, WR should rise.

targets.rawSql: SELECT experiment_id AS "Experiment", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type IN ('shadow_tp','shadow_sl','shadow_breakeven')) AS "Resolved", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_tp') AS "TP", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_sl') AS "SL", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_breakeven') AS "BE", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_tp')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type IN ('shadow_tp','shadow_sl')), 0), 1) AS "WR %", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_breakeven')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type IN ('shadow_tp','shadow_sl','shadow_breakeven')), 0), 1) AS "BE %" FROM ml_setups WHERE experiment_id IN ('shadow_tuning_v16_2026_04_18_be_fix','batch1_tp1_rr_1_3_2026_04_20') AND outcome_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY experiment_id ORDER BY MIN(created_at)

panels.title: Daily Outcome Distribution — Last 14 Days
panels.description: Shadow outcomes per day. Watch for the BE bar (yellow) shrinking after 2026-04-20.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', resolved_at) AS time, outcome_type AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ml_setups WHERE resolved_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND outcome_type IN ('shadow_tp','shadow_sl','shadow_breakeven') GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', resolved_at), outcome_type ORDER BY time

panels.title: Dedup Rate by Setup (24h)
panels.description: Shadow dedup = same unfilled setup detected again within 4h window. High dedup (>60%) indicates stale setup detection.

targets.rawSql: SELECT setup_type AS "Setup", COUNT(*) AS "Total 24h", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_dedup') AS "Deduped", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome_type = 'shadow_dedup')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS "Dedup %" FROM ml_setups WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY setup_type ORDER BY "Total 24h" DESC

panels.title: Avg Time to Resolution by Outcome (Current Experiment)
panels.description: How long shadows take to resolve. BE resolving fast (<30min) suggests wick triggers — Batch 1 goal is to extend this.

targets.rawSql: SELECT outcome_type AS "Outcome", COUNT(*) AS "N", ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at))/60)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Min", ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at))/60)::numeric, 1) AS "Min", ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at))/60)::numeric, 1) AS "Max" FROM ml_setups WHERE experiment_id = 'batch1_tp1_rr_1_3_2026_04_20' AND outcome_type IN ('shadow_tp','shadow_sl','shadow_breakeven','shadow_timeout') AND resolved_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY outcome_type ORDER BY outcome_type
